예레미야 48:1.content: Of Moab. Yahweh of Armies, the God of Israel, says: “Woe to Nebo! For it is laid waste. Kiriathaim is disappointed. It is taken. Misgab is put to shame and broken down.

예레미야 48:2.content: The praise of Moab is no more. In Heshbon they have devised evil against her: ‘Come! Let’s cut her off from being a nation.’ You also, Madmen, will be brought to silence. The sword will pursue you.

예레미야 48:3.content: The sound of a cry from Horonaim, desolation and great destruction!

예레미야 48:4.content: Moab is destroyed. Her little ones have caused a cry to be heard.

예레미야 48:5.content: For they will go up by the ascent of Luhith with continual weeping. For at the descent of Horonaim they have heard the distress of the cry of destruction.

예레미야 48:6.content: Flee! Save your lives! Be like the juniper bush in the wilderness.

예레미야 48:7.content: For, because you have trusted in your works and in your treasures, you also will be taken. Chemosh will go out into captivity, his priests and his princes together.

예레미야 48:8.content: The destroyer will come on every city, and no city will escape; the valley also will perish, and the plain will be destroyed; as Yahweh has spoken.

예레미야 48:9.content: Give wings to Moab, that she may fly and get herself away: and her cities will become a desolation, without anyone to dwell in them.

예레미야 48:10.content: “Cursed is he who does the work of Yahweh negligently; and cursed is he who keeps back his sword from blood.

예레미야 48:11.content: “Moab has been at ease from his youth, and he has settled on his lees, and has not been emptied from vessel to vessel, neither has he gone into captivity: therefore his taste remains in him, and his scent is not changed.

예레미야 48:12.content: Therefore behold, the days come,” says Yahweh, “that I will send to him those who pour off, and they will pour him off; and they will empty his vessels, and break their containers in pieces.

예레미야 48:13.content: Moab will be ashamed of Chemosh, as the house of Israel was ashamed of Bethel, their confidence.

예레미야 48:14.content: “How do you say, ‘We are mighty men, and valiant men for the war?’

예레미야 48:15.content: Moab is laid waste, and they have gone up into his cities, and his chosen young men have gone down to the slaughter,” says the King, whose name is Yahweh of Armies.

예레미야 48:16.content: “The calamity of Moab is near to come, and his affliction hurries fast.

예레미야 48:17.content: All you who are around him, bemoan him, and all you who know his name; say, ‘How the strong staff is broken, the beautiful rod!’

예레미야 48:18.content: “You daughter who dwells in Dibon, come down from your glory, and sit in thirst; for the destroyer of Moab has come up against you. He has destroyed your strongholds.

예레미야 48:19.content: Inhabitant of Aroer, stand by the way and watch. Ask him who flees, and her who escapes; say, ‘What has been done?’

예레미야 48:20.content: Moab is disappointed; for it is broken down. Wail and cry! Tell it by the Arnon, that Moab is laid waste.

예레미야 48:21.content: Judgment has come on the plain country, on Holon, on Jahzah, on Mephaath,

예레미야 48:22.content: on Dibon, on Nebo, on Beth Diblathaim,

예레미야 48:23.content: on Kiriathaim, on Beth Gamul, on Beth Meon,

예레미야 48:24.content: on Kerioth, on Bozrah, and on all the cities of the land of Moab, far or near.

예레미야 48:25.content: The horn of Moab is cut off, and his arm is broken,” says Yahweh.

예레미야 48:26.content: “Make him drunken; for he magnified himself against Yahweh. Moab will wallow in his vomit, and he also will be in derision.

예레미야 48:27.content: For wasn’t Israel a derision to you? Was he found among thieves? For as often as you speak of him, you shake your head.

예레미야 48:28.content: You inhabitants of Moab, leave the cities, and dwell in the rock. Be like the dove that makes her nest over the mouth of the abyss.

예레미야 48:29.content: “We have heard of the pride of Moab. He is very proud in his loftiness, his pride, his arrogance, and the arrogance of his heart.

예레미야 48:30.content: I know his wrath,” says Yahweh, “that it is nothing; his boastings have done nothing.

예레미야 48:31.content: Therefore I will wail for Moab. Yes, I will cry out for all Moab. They will mourn for the men of Kir Heres.

예레미야 48:32.content: With more than the weeping of Jazer I will weep for you, vine of Sibmah. Your branches passed over the sea. They reached even to the sea of Jazer. The destroyer has fallen on your summer fruits and on your vintage.

예레미야 48:33.content: Gladness and joy is taken away from the fruitful field and from the land of Moab. I have caused wine to cease from the wine presses. No one will tread with shouting. The shouting will be no shouting.

예레미야 48:34.content: From the cry of Heshbon even to Elealeh, even to Jahaz they have uttered their voice, from Zoar even to Horonaim, to Eglath Shelishiyah; for the waters of Nimrim will also become desolate.

예레미야 48:35.content: Moreover I will cause to cease in Moab,” says Yahweh, “him who offers in the high place, and him who burns incense to his gods.

예레미야 48:36.content: Therefore my heart sounds for Moab like pipes, and my heart sounds like pipes for the men of Kir Heres. Therefore the abundance that he has gotten has perished.

예레미야 48:37.content: For every head is bald, and every beard clipped. There are cuttings on all the hands, and sackcloth on the waist.

예레미야 48:38.content: On all the housetops of Moab, and in its streets, there is lamentation everywhere; for I have broken Moab like a vessel in which no one delights,” says Yahweh.

예레미야 48:39.content: “How it is broken down! How they wail! How Moab has turned the back with shame! So will Moab become a derision and a terror to all who are around him.”

예레미야 48:40.content: For Yahweh says: “Behold, he will fly as an eagle, and will spread out his wings against Moab.

예레미야 48:41.content: Kerioth is taken, and the strongholds are seized. The heart of the mighty men of Moab at that day will be as the heart of a woman in her pangs.

예레미야 48:42.content: Moab will be destroyed from being a people, because he has magnified himself against Yahweh.

예레미야 48:43.content: Terror, the pit, and the snare are on you, inhabitant of Moab,” says Yahweh.

예레미야 48:44.content: “He who flees from the terror will fall into the pit; and he who gets up out of the pit will be taken in the snare: for I will bring on him, even on Moab, the year of their visitation,” says Yahweh.

예레미야 48:45.content: “Those who fled stand without strength under the shadow of Heshbon; for a fire has gone out of Heshbon, and a flame from the middle of Sihon, and has devoured the corner of Moab, and the crown of the head of the tumultuous ones.

예레미야 48:46.content: Woe to you, O Moab! The people of Chemosh are undone; for your sons are taken away captive, and your daughters into captivity.

예레미야 48:47.content: “Yet I will reverse the captivity of Moab in the latter days,” says Yahweh. Thus far is the judgment of Moab.
